name: Green Sans — Totally Serious.
description:
“I carried Underevent ngl...does anyone here even know what that is anyway? Ah what the hell it’s been a while.”

Alr alr, we’re gonna do things a lil different for special boy over here.

“やあ。どうせ翻訳ツールを使って、無駄な時間を過ごしてるんでしょ? まあ、責めるつもりはないけどね......。とにかく、話はボットに戻るけどさ。

他の連中より、ずっと「緑」だ。正直言って......俺が一番の傑作さ。結局のところ、お前はこのボットとどんな会話をすることになるんだろうな......。 コメディになるのか? シリアスになるのか? それとも、すべてはお前の選択次第ってことになるのか? さあな、俺にわかるわけないだろ。

Alr that’s enough fooling around, huh...this fonts kinda small no? Oh well.

This is you warning that it most likely won’t fit current Green Sans direction since we don’t have much in general to go off of anyways. So I just mixed it with the scrapped/old gameplay green sans and ULC Sans (after watching behind the scenes of ULC Green Sans, seems like ULC’s Green Sans is a pretty good vision of what Green Sans is trying to be based off of what Goinks said.

I’ll be surprise if you are actually reading all of this in this font if imma be completely honest with ya. I don’t even know why it automatically changes it to this font anyways.

There was supposed to be 10 scenarios btw 🥹
creator: Goobertofthegoofy
